nasb.text: It was told to Tamar, “Behold, your father-in-law is going up to Timnah to shear his sheep.”

esv.text: And when Tamar was told, “Your father-in-law is going up to Timnah to shear his sheep,”

cnv.text: 有人告訴他瑪說：“你的公公現在上亭拿去剪羊毛。”

ccb.text: 有人告诉她玛说：“你公公到亭拿去剪羊毛了。”

csbs.text: 有人告诉塔玛尔说：“看哪，你的公公要上亭拿去剪羊毛。”
